content.en:
After the Qingfeng Holy Lord decided to snatch the saint-level ore veins of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, he immediately arranged for the two Invincible Domain Ancestors to go to the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

This time, there is no need for many domain ancestors to be arranged, and the focus is on the elite.

If you arrange for the Supreme Domain Ancestor to go, it will be easy to be exposed, and it will not be of much use.

In addition, the two Invincible Domain Ancestors arranged this time rarely came forward, and the outside world did not know that they were the Invincible Domain Ancestors of the Qingyuan Holy Land.

Even if it is discovered, the outside world may not be able to find out that it was done by Qingyuan Holy Land, so it is safer.

this day.

The two Invincible Domain Ancestors of the Qingyuan Holy Land set off and headed for the Xuanxu Holy Realm in the Daoshan Realm.

The strength of these two invincible domain ancestors is not weak, although they have not reached the level of the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, but they are much stronger than the domain ancestors on the supreme list.

Therefore, the Qingfeng Saint Ancestor thought that if these two Invincible Domain Ancestors made a move, they would definitely be able to snatch away that saint-level ore vein, even if it was discovered by Ye Tian, it didn't matter.

The speed of the Invincible Domain Ancestors is very fast, plus they have been shuttling at the fastest speed.

In just a few thousand years, these two Invincible Domain Ancestors had arrived at the Dao Mountain Realm.

After the two of them arrived at the Daoshan Realm, they restrained their breath with all their might.

Although the two of them were very confident in their own strength, the situation in the Key Dao Mountain Realm was more complicated, and many domain ancestors from the Dark Sacred Domain had come here, and the Qingyuan Holy Land was actually not a powerful force.

Compared with other forces, the Qingyuan Holy Land was a little bolder this time.

Therefore, they still need to be careful, so as not to make mistakes and cause the plan to fail, which is not good.

"Wansheng Domain Ancestor, let's go directly to the place where the saint-level ore vein is, use the holy artifact Qingyuan Realm Bead to intercept the void where the ore vein is located, and then leave!"

Mi Li Yu Ancestor spoke.

"Good!"

The Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Lives Domain nodded.

Immediately, the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor and the Mili Domain Ancestor went to the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and they didn't directly tear the void into the Xuanxu Holy Realm, that was too obvious.

Therefore, they followed ordinary cultivators from the entrances of the worlds of the Xuanxu Holy Realm to enter the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and in this way, they mixed into the interior of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and no one knew that there were two invincible domain ancestors who had mixed in.

Soon, the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor and the Mili Domain Ancestor came to the place where the saint-level ore vein was located.

At this time, they saw the large array that shrouded the saint-level ore veins and the Terran domain ancestors who were guarding here.

"There is no Supreme Domain Ancestor to guard, these Domain Ancestors are too weak to pose any threat!

Wansheng Domain Ancestor asked.

"Kill, if you don't kill, it's not good to intercept this piece of void, once these domain ancestors attack, it will also cause the void to shock, which will cause the Qingyuan Realm Bead to intercept this piece of void much slower, then it will delay time, I don't want to meet the ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain, I can't kill it, it's best to avoid the Ancestors of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain!"

Mi Li Yu Ancestor proposed.

"Okay, then let's attack directly with the soul attack secret technique!"

The Ancestral Dao of the Ten Thousand Realms.

Invincible Domain Ancestor killed a group of weaklings with only the top Domain Ancestor at the top, which was naturally very easy.

Rumble!!!!!

A terrifying soul fluctuation swept through the saint-level ore veins.

At this time, the Terran Domain Ancestors who were guarding the Saint-level ore veins seemed to be frozen, and their souls were annihilated one by one, even the top Domain Ancestors were no exception, and they fell and died one after another.

At this moment, the Mili Domain Ancestor took out the Qingyuan Realm Bead.

"Close!"

Tear and pull!!!

This piece of void near the saint-level ore vein was forcibly deprived from the Xuanxu Saint Realm by the Qingyuan Realm Bead, and a large piece of void directly detached from this area, and continued to shrink, and was sealed into the interior of the Qingyuan Realm Bead.

"It's successful, quickly tear apart the world barrier of the Xuanxu Saint Realm and leave!"

Wansheng Domain Ancestor said excitedly.

--------------

Terran, Terran.

Ye Tian's body was cultivating, and the moment the formation of the saint-grade ore vein was broken, he sensed it.

Moreover, he was the master of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and he knew the location of the saint-level ore vein, so he immediately communicated with the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, and his eyes spied on the area of the saint-level ore vein.

Rumble!!!!

The void opened, and Ye Tian's gaze crossed the void and saw two invincible domain ancestors, the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestors and the Mili Domain Ancestors.

The saint-level veins were taken away by them, and at this time, these two invincible domain ancestors were preparing to break through the world barrier and leave.

If it was an ordinary Saint Realm Lord, he really wouldn't have time to stop them, after all, it would take time to rush over.

Moreover, the Supreme Domain Ancestor level Saint Realm Lord had no way to prevent the two Invincible Domain Ancestors from leaving.

But Ye Tian is not an ordinary Lord of the Holy Realm, and he also controls the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, and his control over the Holy Realm can be called the first.

The saint-level vein disappeared, and the two invincible domain ancestors appeared there, and it was obvious that the result was that the Terran domain ancestor who guarded the saint-level ore vein had fallen.

"I didn't expect anyone to dare to attack the saint-grade ore vein!"

Ye Tian was extremely angry.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian fully mobilized the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, without the slightest reservation.

"Suppression!"

Ye Tian carried the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm to suppress the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor and the Mili Domain Ancestor, and he himself quickly shuttled over.

At this time.

The Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor and the Mili Domain Ancestor were about to tear apart the world barrier of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and a world force suppressed it, this world power far surpassed the level of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, although it was far from enough to kill them, but it stopped them, and failed to allow them to break the world barrier of the Xuanxu Holy Realm in an instant and leave.

Bang bang!!

The Wansheng Domain Ancestor and the Mili Domain Ancestor were forcibly knocked down in the process of shuttling away, and the two of them stood in the void, looked at each other, knowing that they had been discovered by Ye Tian, and Ye Tian actually suppressed them in the air and successfully stopped them.

"It seems that we have to face the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain!"

The Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor and the Mi Li Domain Ancestor frowned.

After all, the Holy Lord's order is that they don't provoke the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors, and they can't kill the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors, otherwise the matter will be too big, once the Battle Gate investigates with all its might, the Qingyuan Holy Land may not be able to hide it, and once the matter is exposed, the Qingyuan Holy Land will be in trouble.

Therefore, they couldn't kill Ye Tian, and finally hit Ye Tian hard before leaving.

Swish!

Ye Tian tore the space and descended, appearing in front of the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor and the Mili Domain Ancestor.

"You two snatched my saint-level ore vein and killed our Terran Domain Ancestor?"

Ye Tian said with monstrous anger.
